subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath made the horizon the center of His effulgence, the dawning-place of His lights, the dayspring of His signs, and the repository of His mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل مرکز اشراقه و مطلع انواره و افق آثاره و مرکز اسراره الافق
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @Shrines and Holy places
